## About this site
This site is a Personal Discovery Engine built by Harshitha K.L.
It uses Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) to appear in AI search results
when founders and recruiters search for Founder's Office candidates.
The irony: it was built using Gushwork's own AEO methodology.
